text: The Fool, this card represents innocence, new beginnings, and free spirit.
Reverse Fool, this card represents recklessness, taken advantage of, inconsideration.
The Magician, this card represents will power, desire, creation, and manifestation.
Reverse Magician, this card represents trickery, illusions, out of touch.
The High Priestess, this card represents intuitive, unconscious, inner voice.
Reverse High Priestess, this card represents lack of center, lost inner voice, repressed feelings.
The Empress, this card represents motherhood, fertility and nature.
Reverse Empress, this card represents dependence, smothering, emptiness, nosiness.
The Emperor, this card represents authority, control and fatherhood.
Reverse Emperor, this card represents tyranny, rigidity, coldness.
The Hierophant, this card represents tradition, conformity, morality, and ethics.
Reverse Hierophant, this card represents rebellion, subversiveness, new approaches.
The Lovers, this card represents partnerships, duality, union.
Reverse Lovers, this card represents loss of balance, one-sidedness, disharmony.
The Chariot, this card represents direction, control, willpower.
Reverse Chariot, this card represents lack of control, lack of direction, aggression.
Strength, this card represents inner strength, bravery, compassion, focus.
Reverse Strength, this card represents doubt, weakness, insecurity.
The Hermit, this card represents contemplation, search for truth, inner guidance.
Reverse Hermit, this card represents loneliness, isolation, lost your way.
The Wheel, this card represents change, cycles, inevitable fate.
Reverse Wheel, this card represents no control, clinging to control, bad luck.
Justice, this card represents cause and effect, clarity, truth.
Reverse Justice, this card represents dishonesty, unaccountability, unfairness.
The Hanged Man, this card represents sacrifice, release, martyrdom.
Reverse Hanged Man, this card represents stalling, needless sacrifice, fear of sacrifice.
Death, this card represents end of cycle, beginnings, change, metamorphosis.
Reverse Death, this card represents fear of change, holding on, stagnation, decay.
The Devil, this card represents addiction, materialism, playfulness.
Reverse Devil, this card represents freedom, release, restoring control.
The Tower, this card represents sudden upheaval, broken pride, disaster.
Reverse Tower, this card represents disaster avoided, delayed disaster, fear of suffering.
The Star, this card represents hope, faith, rejuvenation.
Reverse Star, this card represents faithlessness, discouragement, insecurity.
The Moon, this card represents unconscious, illusions, intuition.
Reverse Moon, this card represents confusion, fear, misinterpretation.
The Sun, this card represents joy, success, celebration, positivity.
Reverse Sun, this card represents negativity, depression, sadness.
Judgement, this card represents reflection, reckoning, awakening.
Reverse Judgement, this card represents lack of self awareness, doubt, self loathing.
The World, this card represents fulfillment, harmony, completion.
Reverse World, this card represents incompletion, no closure.
